title: Thelypodiopsis juniperorum
taxonomy: Thelypodiopsis juniperorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to North America, specifically in the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant belongs to the genus Thelypodiopsis, which is closely related to the genus Thelypodium. Thelypodiopsis juniperorum is often classified as a member of the tribe Thelypodieae within the Brassicaceae family. Further classification may involve the kingdom and other taxonomic ranks, but its primary classification is within the Brassicaceae family.
